info.description: Backend service for managing trading rebates, referrals, and crypto payouts.
info.title: Service API

get.description: Completes Google OAuth. Sets auth cookies and redirects to frontend dashboard.

post.description: Sets access_token and refresh_token cookies, or returns a 2FA-required response if the account has 2FA enabled.
Revokes refresh token cookie and clears auth cookies.
Reads refresh token from httpOnly cookie. Sets new token cookies.

get.description: Returns today, last 7 days, current month, last month, all-time totals, and daily breakdowns for the last 7 and 30 days (chart data).
